# Scaffold Blueprint Template

## Goal
Create a reusable foundation for multiple future workflows.

## Scope
- modular shell
- prompt library foundation
- initial taxonomy and index
- first scheduler loop
- first admin UI shell
- initial memory ledger

## Required docs
- all MVP docs
- object contract
- index and taxonomy doc
- environment template
- operations and recovery template
- build backlog

## Done means
- new modules can be added without redesign
- prompts are indexed
- connectors are classified
- scheduler and logs exist
- admin shell is usable
